# 1/3-2/3 Conjecture — Roadmap

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-05-14 18:15 BST (inter-sweep regen — F18 closed (UCC)). Manual edits will be overwritten on next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

## Headline — the F10 cohomological core is now UNCONDITIONAL; two narrow inputs remain for the full width-3 theorem

The Compatibility-Geometry arc reduced **width-3 Kahn–Saks 1/3-2/3 at general n** to a single master hypothesis (UCC) — gap-free (F10). Today F17 proved **(UCC.1)** and F18 proved **(UCC.2)**, both unconditionally for all n. So **(UCC) is COMPLETE and the F10 cohomological core (parts (i)–(ii): Hyp(n) for all n, H-Cox + sgn, ω_bal existence/uniqueness/pairing) is UNCONDITIONAL.**

**Precise scope — this is the cohomological core, not yet the full width-3 theorem.** F10 part (iii), the *numerical* width-3 conclusion (the explicit [3/11,8/11] interval — the actual 1/3-2/3 statement), still rests on **two further inputs**, NOT part of (UCC) and untouched by the F11→F18 line: **(ICOP-step)** (F10 §5.4) and the **width-3 reduction bridge** (F10 §7.3). Both are narrow/combinatorial, verified n≤6, reduced to clean uniform sub-statements. **F19 (mg-5722) targets both.** If F19 closes, the full width-3 1/3-2/3 theorem is proven at general n (modulo the separate Lean 4-axiom trust surface).

`width3_one_third_two_thirds` is hypothesis-free on `origin/main` since 2026-05-05. Trust surface: **4 axioms** + 5 native_decide — **unchanged** (the entire F-series is paper-level structural cohomology; no new axioms, no Lean changes).

- **1/3-2/3:** decisive convergence. ## Sister product line — Union-Closed (Frankl), `union_closed` repo

New product line, Daniel-assigned 2026-05-14: pursue the Union-Closed Sets conjecture via compatibility geometry. Repo `union_closed` (drellem2/union_closed) stood up today.

- **In flight: mg-0bf7 — UC4** — close the large-fibre residual + assemble the I1 interlock (UC3 follow-on). High priority, 350k, multi-session.
- **Shipped: mg-f72a — UC1 — AMBER-partial-transfer** — the compatibility-geometry *framework* transfers to Frankl, decoupled from both 1/3-2/3 engines; native Walsh handle.
- **Shipped: mg-a814 — UC2 — GREEN-structure-theory** — the coordinate-transport structure theory; localized Frankl's residual difficulty to the intermediate trace-classes of a minimal generator of size ≥ 3 (Frankl's known frontier, reproduced from inside the framework).
- **Shipped: mg-cfc0 — UC3 — GREEN-walsh-characterization** — the sub-cube Walsh spectrum relative to a minimal generator is characterized; the residual is localized to the *large fibres*; a native sufficient condition on the m(𝓕)≥3 frontier is proven; the localized object is shown **structurally past the entropy-method (Sawin) ceiling** — the residual is a finitary exact inequality, not an asymptotic estimate. UC4 attacks that residual.
- *Trajectory:* launched and viable in one day — UC1→UC2→UC3 founded the framework, built the structure theory, and got structurally past the known Frankl frontier ceiling; UC4 is the attack on the localized residual. All UC1–UC3 deliverables on `union_closed` main.
